title: potentilla × collina subsp. sordida
intro: Potentilla × collina subsp. sordida, also known as the hybrid cinquefoil, is a plant species that is a cross between Potentilla collina and Potentilla sordida. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Potentilla × collina subsp. sordida include its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
